---
title: "iNat_SAC"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-22"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(tidyr)
library(sf)
library(patchwork)
library(terra)
library(exactextractr)
library(purrr)
library(vegan)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(MASS)
```

```{r data_import, , include=FALSE}
inat_hull <- read_csv("hull_all.csv")
```

```{r descriptives}
users <- unique(inat_hull$user_id)
```

```{r data cleaning}
# Filter to research grade, species level & remove NA
inat_hull_clean <- inat_hull %>%
  filter(!is.na(license) & str_trim(license) != "") %>%
  filter(quality_grade == "research") %>%  # only research-grade
  mutate(
    # If it's a hybrid (contains ×), keep the full name; otherwise take first two words
    scientific_name = if_else(
      str_detect(scientific_name, "×"),
      scientific_name,  # keep hybrids as-is
      word(scientific_name, 1, 2)  # take first two words (Genus + species)
    )
  )%>%
  drop_na(scientific_name)

# check remaining licences
table(inat_hull_clean$license)
```

```{r quality check}
# check length of scientific names
cat("Word counts in inat_hull_clean:\n")
table(str_count(inat_hull_clean$scientific_name, "\\S+"))

# Count words in each scientific name
word_counts <- str_count(inat_hull_clean$scientific_name, "\\S+")

# Filter for 3, 4, or 5 words
subset_names <- inat_hull_clean$scientific_name[word_counts %in% 3:5]

# check for subspecies
cat("Scientific names with 3, 4, or 5 words:\n")
print(subset_names)
```

```{r aggregate by month}
inat_hull_clean <- inat_hull_clean %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(observed_on),                  # YYYY-MM-DD
    month = floor_date(date, "month")             # rounds down to first of month
  )

# Subset to Sep 2020 - Sep 2025 and create Sep->Sep "biological year"
inat_hull_sub <- inat_hull_clean %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2020-09-01") & date <= as.Date("2025-09-30")) %>%
  mutate(sep_year = year(date + months(3)))       # shifts Sep->Jan for year labeling

# Aggregate species by month
sac_df <- inat_hull_sub %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(month_species = list(unique(scientific_name))) %>%
  ungroup()

# Compute true cumulative species richness
seen_species <- c()
cum_species <- c()

for (sp in sac_df$month_species) {
  seen_species <- unique(c(seen_species, sp))   # add new species
  cum_species <- c(cum_species, length(seen_species))
}

sac_df$cum_species <- cum_species

# Quick check
tail(sac_df)

# plot
ggplot(sac_df, aes(x = month, y = cum_species)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Cumulative Species Richness",
       title = "Monthly Species Accumulation Curve (Hull iNaturalist)") +
  theme_minimal()

# write subset
write.csv(inat_hull_sub, "inat_hull_sub.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r remove CNC}
# Define CNC weekend ranges
cnc_ranges <- list(
  "2023" = as.Date(c("2023-04-28", "2023-05-01")),
  "2024" = as.Date(c("2024-04-26", "2024-04-29")),
  "2025" = as.Date(c("2025-04-25", "2025-04-28"))
)

# Filter out CNC weekends
inat_no_cnc <- inat_hull_sub %>%
  filter(
    !(date >= cnc_ranges[["2023"]][1] & date <= cnc_ranges[["2023"]][2]) &
    !(date >= cnc_ranges[["2024"]][1] & date <= cnc_ranges[["2024"]][2]) &
    !(date >= cnc_ranges[["2025"]][1] & date <= cnc_ranges[["2025"]][2])
  )

# Aggregate species by month (same as before)
sac_no_cnc <- inat_no_cnc %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(month_species = list(unique(scientific_name))) %>%
  ungroup()

# Compute cumulative species
seen_species <- c()
cum_species <- c()
for (sp in sac_no_cnc$month_species) {
  seen_species <- unique(c(seen_species, sp))
  cum_species <- c(cum_species, length(seen_species))
}
sac_no_cnc$cum_species <- cum_species


# Plot SAC with and without CNC
ggplot() +
  geom_line(data = sac_df, aes(x = month, y = cum_species), color = "orange", size = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(data = sac_no_cnc, aes(x = month, y = cum_species), color = "steelblue", size = 1.2) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Cumulative Species Richness",
       title = "Species Accumulation Curve: With vs Without CNC") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b-%Y", date_breaks = "3 months")

# plot 2
merged_df <- merge(sac_df, sac_no_cnc, by = "month", suffixes = c("_with", "_without"))

ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = month)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = cum_species_without, ymax = cum_species_with), fill = "orange", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_line(aes(y = cum_species_with), color = "orange", size = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(aes(y = cum_species_without), color = "steelblue", size = 1.2) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Cumulative Species Richness",
       title = "Species Accumulation Curve: With vs Without CNC") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b-%Y", date_breaks = "4 month")
```

```{r differences over time}
# Merge the two datasets by month
merged_df <- merge(sac_df, sac_no_cnc, by = "month", suffixes = c("_with", "_without"))

# Create a new column for the difference
merged_df$diff <- merged_df$cum_species_with - merged_df$cum_species_without

# View the difference
head(merged_df)

# plot the difference over time
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(merged_df, aes(x = month, y = diff)) +
  geom_line(color = "red", size = 1.2) +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "Difference in Cumulative Species Richness",
       title = "Difference Between With vs Without CNC") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b-%Y", date_breaks = "3 months")

```

```{r recorders}
# Must have at least: recorder_id, date
records_summary <- inat_hull_sub %>%
  mutate(year = year(date),
         month = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%  # group by month
  group_by(year, month, user_id) %>%
  summarise(n_records = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(pct_records = 100 * n_records / sum(n_records))

# Ranked
ranked_summary <- records_summary %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(rank = rank(-n_records, ties.method = "first"))

#
cum_contrib <- ranked_summary %>%
  arrange(year, month, rank) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(cum_pct = cumsum(pct_records))

# month stat
contrib_stats <- cum_contrib %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(
    n_to_50pct = min(rank[cum_pct >= 50]),   # number of recorders needed to reach 50%
    n_to_80pct = min(rank[cum_pct >= 80])    # number needed to reach 80%
  )

#month 
ggplot(contrib_stats, aes(x = factor(year), y = n_to_50pct)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue") +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Recorders needed to reach 50%",
       title = "Broadening of Recorder Contributions Over Time") +
  theme_minimal()

##
species_summary <- inat_hull_sub %>%
  mutate(year = year(date),
         month = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%
  group_by(year, month, user_id) %>%
  summarise(n_species = n_distinct(scientific_name), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(pct_species = 100 * n_species / sum(n_species)) %>%
  arrange(year, month, desc(n_species)) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(rank = rank(-n_species, ties.method = "first"),
         cum_pct = cumsum(pct_species)) %>%
  summarise(
    n_to_50pct = min(rank[cum_pct >= 50]),
    n_to_80pct = min(rank[cum_pct >= 80])
  )

# species by user and year
ggplot(species_summary, aes(x = factor(year), y = n_to_80pct)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightgreen") +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Recorders needed to reach 80% of species",
    title = "Contributions to Species Diversity Over Time"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# species by user and month (line)

p1 <- ggplot(species_summary, aes(x = month, y = n_to_80pct)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(color = "darkblue", size = 1) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "3 months") +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Recorders needed to reach 80% of species",
    title = "Monthly Contributions to Species Diversity Over Time"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
p1

#
recorders_per_month <- inat_hull_sub %>%
  mutate(month = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(n_recorders = n_distinct(user_id))

p2 <- ggplot(recorders_per_month, aes(x = month, y = n_recorders)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkorange") +
  geom_point(color = "red", size = 1) +
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of active recorders",
    title = "Monthly User Participation in Citizen Science"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
p2

combined <- p1/p2
combined

# top 10 
top10_summary <- records_summary %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(rank = rank(-n_records, ties.method = "first"),
         group = ifelse(rank <= 10, "Top 10", "Others")) %>%
  group_by(year, month, group) %>%
  summarise(pct_records = sum(pct_records), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(top10_summary, aes(x = month, y = pct_records, color = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~year, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "% of total records",
       color = "Recorder group",
       title = "Top 10 Recorders vs Others Over Time") +
  theme_minimal()

# top 5
top5_summary <- records_summary %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  mutate(rank = rank(-n_records, ties.method = "first"),
         group = ifelse(rank <= 5, "Top 5", "Others")) %>%
  group_by(year, month, group) %>%
  summarise(pct_records = sum(pct_records), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(top5_summary, aes(x = month, y = pct_records, color = group)) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~year, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(x = "Month", y = "% of total records",
       color = "Recorder group",
       title = "Top 5 Recorders vs Others Over Time") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r unique to cnc}
# CNC observations
cnc_observations <- anti_join(inat_hull_clean, inat_no_cnc, by = "id")

# Create a CNC indicator in the full dataset
inat_full <- inat_hull_clean %>%
  mutate(is_cnc = id %in% cnc_observations$id)

# Collapse subspecies to species (first two words), keep hybrids intact
cnc_observations <- cnc_observations %>%
  mutate(
    scientific_name = if_else(
      str_detect(scientific_name, "×"),
      scientific_name,       # keep hybrids
      word(scientific_name, 1, 2)  # species-level
    )
  )

inat_no_cnc <- inat_no_cnc %>%
  mutate(
    scientific_name = if_else(
      str_detect(scientific_name, "×"),
      scientific_name,
      word(scientific_name, 1, 2)
    )
  )

# Get CNC-only species using corrected scientific names
cnc_unique <- cnc_observations %>%
  anti_join(inat_no_cnc, by = "scientific_name") %>%  # ensure true uniqueness
  select(scientific_name, iconic_taxon_name, user_id, date, month) %>%
  add_count(scientific_name, name = "obs_count") %>%
  distinct(scientific_name, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(desc(obs_count), iconic_taxon_name, scientific_name)

cat("Total CNC-unique species:", nrow(cnc_unique), "\n")

# Taxonomic breakdown 
taxonomic_summary <- cnc_unique %>%
  count(iconic_taxon_name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    percentage = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1),
    label = paste0(iconic_taxon_name, "\n(", n, " species, ", percentage, "%)")
  )

cat("Taxonomic breakdown of CNC-unique species:\n")
print(taxonomic_summary)

# Most observed CNC-unique species
top_species <- cnc_unique %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  mutate(display_name = scientific_name)

cat("Top 20 most observed CNC-unique species:\n")
print(top_species %>% select(display_name, iconic_taxon_name, obs_count))

# Temporal distribution
monthly_unique <- cnc_observations %>%
  anti_join(inat_no_cnc, by = "scientific_name") %>%
  count(month, iconic_taxon_name) %>%
  complete(month, iconic_taxon_name, fill = list(n = 0))

# Visualizations
p1 <- ggplot(taxonomic_summary, aes(x = "", y = n, fill = iconic_taxon_name)) +
  geom_col(width = 1) +
  coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
  labs(
    title = "Taxonomic Groups of CNC-Unique Species",
    subtitle = paste("Total:", sum(taxonomic_summary$n), "species"),
    fill = "Taxonomic Group"
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "right")

p2 <- ggplot(top_species, aes(x = fct_reorder(display_name, obs_count), y = obs_count, fill = iconic_taxon_name)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Most Frequently Observed CNC-Unique Species",
    x = "Species",
    y = "Number of CNC Observations",
    fill = "Taxonomic Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))

p3 <- ggplot(monthly_unique, aes(x = month, y = n, fill = iconic_taxon_name)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  labs(
    title = "When CNC-Unique Species Were Discovered",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Number of Unique Species Observed",
    fill = "Taxonomic Group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Rarity analysis - single observation species
single_obs_species <- cnc_unique %>%
  filter(obs_count == 1) %>%
  count(iconic_taxon_name, sort = TRUE)

p4 <- ggplot(single_obs_species, aes(x = fct_reorder(iconic_taxon_name, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "coral", alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "CNC-Unique Species with Only 1 Observation",
    subtitle = "Potential 'one-off' discoveries during CNC events",
    x = "Taxonomic Group",
    y = "Number of Single-Observation Species"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Print plots
print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)
print(p4)

# Complete species list by taxonomic group
cat("\n=== COMPLETE BREAKDOWN BY TAXONOMIC GROUP ===\n")
for(taxon in taxonomic_summary$iconic_taxon_name) {
  cat("\n", paste(rep("=", 50), collapse=""), "\n")
  cat(toupper(taxon), "(", sum(cnc_unique$iconic_taxon_name == taxon), "species )\n")
  cat(paste(rep("=", 50), collapse=""), "\n")
  
  species_in_taxon <- cnc_unique %>%
    filter(iconic_taxon_name == taxon) %>%
    arrange(desc(obs_count), scientific_name) %>%
    mutate(display = paste0(sprintf("%2d obs - ", obs_count), scientific_name)) %>%
    pull(display)
  
  cat(paste(species_in_taxon, collapse = "\n"), "\n")
}

# Summary statistics
cat("\n=== SUMMARY STATS ===\n")
cat("Species with only 1 observation:", sum(cnc_unique$obs_count == 1), "\n")
cat("Species with 2-5 observations:", sum(cnc_unique$obs_count %in% 2:5), "\n")
cat("Species with 6+ observations:", sum(cnc_unique$obs_count >= 6), "\n")
cat("Most observed unique species:", max(cnc_unique$obs_count), "observations\n")
```
```{r users per month}
full_spatial <- inat_hull_sub  %>%
filter(
    year(observed_on) %in% 2023:2025)

before_cnc <- inat_hull_sub %>%
  filter(
    year(observed_on) %in% 2020:2022)

# Prepare average monthly users for CNC years
full_spatial_summary <- full_spatial %>%
  group_by(year = year(observed_on), month = month(observed_on, label = TRUE)) %>%
  summarise(unique_users = n_distinct(user_id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(mean_users = mean(unique_users), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(period = "CNC Years (2023-2025)")

# Prepare average monthly users for pre-CNC years
before_cnc_summary <- before_cnc %>%
  group_by(year = year(observed_on), month = month(observed_on, label = TRUE)) %>%
  summarise(unique_users = n_distinct(user_id), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(month) %>%
  summarise(mean_users = mean(unique_users), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(period = "Pre-CNC (2020-2022)")

# Combine
plot_data <- bind_rows(full_spatial_summary, before_cnc_summary)

# Plot with dodged bars
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = month, y = mean_users, fill = period)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "CNC Years (2023-2025)" = "#74AC00",
    "Pre-CNC (2020-2022)" = "steelblue"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Monthly Unique iNaturalist Users",
    x = "Month",
    y = "Average Unique Users",
    fill = "Period"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r filter records to cnc and non-cnc regardless of grade}
inat_hull <- inat_hull %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(observed_on),                  # YYYY-MM-DD
    month = floor_date(date, "month")             # rounds down to first of month
  )

# Define CNC date ranges (Fri–Mon for CNC weekends)
cnc_ranges <- list(
  "2023" = as.Date(c("2023-04-28", "2023-05-01")),
  "2024" = as.Date(c("2024-04-26", "2024-04-29")),
  "2025" = as.Date(c("2025-04-25", "2025-04-28"))
)

# Create relative 7-day (Tue–Mon) week windows around CNC
cnc_weeks <- map_dfr(names(cnc_ranges), function(y) {
  range <- cnc_ranges[[y]]
  # find the Tuesday before the CNC Friday (week 0 start)
  cnc_tue <- floor_date(range[1], "week", week_start = 2)
  tibble(
    year = as.integer(y),
    rel_week = -5:5,
    week_start = cnc_tue + weeks(-5:5),
    week_end = cnc_tue + weeks(-5:5) + days(6)
  )
})

# Sanity checks
# Check that all weeks start on Tuesday
table(wday(cnc_weeks$week_start, label = TRUE))
# Should return only "Tue"

# Inspect CNC-relative weeks visually
print(cnc_weeks)

# Remove full CNC (week 0) window
inat_no_cnc <- inat_hull %>%
  filter(
    !(date >= as.Date("2023-04-25") & date <= as.Date("2023-05-01")) &
    !(date >= as.Date("2024-04-23") & date <= as.Date("2024-04-29")) &
    !(date >= as.Date("2025-04-22") & date <= as.Date("2025-04-28"))
  )

cnc_observations <- inat_hull %>%
  filter(
    (date >= as.Date("2023-04-25") & date <= as.Date("2023-05-01")) |
    (date >= as.Date("2024-04-23") & date <= as.Date("2024-04-29")) |
    (date >= as.Date("2025-04-22") & date <= as.Date("2025-04-28"))
  )

# quick chec
nrow(inat_hull) == nrow(inat_no_cnc) + nrow(cnc_observations)
```

```{r user activity in grid}
# Create baseline (all non-CNC observations)
baseline_sf <- inat_no_cnc %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 27700)

# import grid
grid_sf <- st_read("250m_grid_roi.shp")
roi_landcover <- rast("ROI_1m_res.tif")
grid_sf <- st_transform(grid_sf, crs(roi_landcover))
grid_sf <- grid_sf %>% rename(grid_id = id)

# Assign baseline points to grid cells
baseline_join <- st_join(baseline_sf, grid_sf, join = st_within) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(observed_on),
         year = year(date))

# Match baseline observations to relative weeks
baseline_weeks <- baseline_join %>%
  left_join(cnc_weeks, by = "year") %>%
  filter(date >= week_start & date <= week_end) %>%
  select(grid_id, user_id, year, rel_week)

# Summarise unique users per grid per year per relative week
baseline_summary <- baseline_weeks %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(grid_id, year, rel_week) %>%
  summarise(unique_users = n_distinct(user_id), .groups = "drop")

# Create CNC observations sf
cnc_sf <- cnc_observations %>%       # <-- your CNC dataset
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 27700)
#
cnc_join <- st_join(cnc_sf, grid_sf, join = st_within) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(observed_on),
         year = year(date))

cnc_weeks_join <- cnc_join %>%
  left_join(cnc_weeks, by = "year") %>%
  filter(date >= week_start & date <= week_end) %>%
  select(grid_id, user_id, year, rel_week)

cnc_summary <- cnc_weeks_join %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(grid_id, year, rel_week) %>%
  summarise(cnc_users = n_distinct(user_id), .groups = "drop")

# Merge baseline + CNC summaries
grid_summary <- full_join(
  baseline_summary, cnc_summary,
  by = c("grid_id", "year", "rel_week")  # 👈 include year here
) %>%
  replace_na(list(unique_users = 0, cnc_users = 0)) %>%
  mutate(
    diff_users = cnc_users - unique_users,
    ratio_users = ifelse(unique_users == 0, NA, cnc_users / unique_users)
  )

# Join summary back to grid geometry 
grid_sf_out <- grid_sf %>%
  left_join(grid_summary, by = "grid_id")

# keep year for export
st_write(grid_sf_out, "inat_users_250m_grid_7day_relative_weeks_yearly.shp",
         delete_layer = TRUE)


# sanity check on week alignment 
# Verify CNC dates fall in rel_week == 0
check_dates <- as.Date(c("2024-04-25", "2024-04-26", "2024-04-29", "2024-05-02"))
check_dates %>%
  tibble(date = .) %>%
  mutate(year = year(date)) %>%
  left_join(cnc_weeks, by = "year") %>%
  filter(date >= week_start & date <= week_end) %>%
  select(date, rel_week, week_start, week_end)

# Grid per year
table(baseline_summary$year)
table(cnc_summary$year)
length(unique(baseline_sf$user_id))
length(unique(cnc_sf$user_id))
```

```{r roi raster analysis}
# Extract land-cover proportions for ACTIVE + INACTIVE grids

# Define the years you want to process
years_to_process <- c(2023, 2024, 2025)

# Load static layers (only once)
grid_sf <- st_read("250m_grid_roi.shp") %>%
  st_transform(crs = 27700) %>%
  rename(grid_id = id)

roi_landcover <- rast("ROI_1m_res.tif")

# Prepare output list 
roi_lc_all_years <- list()

# Loop over years (active grids only)
for (year_to_process in years_to_process) {
  message("Processing year: ", year_to_process)

  grid_summary_year <- grid_summary %>%
    filter(year == year_to_process)

  roi_effort <- st_transform(grid_sf, crs(roi_landcover))

  roi_lc_extract <- exactextractr::exact_extract(
    roi_landcover, roi_effort,
    function(values, coverage_fraction) {
      tapply(coverage_fraction, values, sum, na.rm = TRUE)
    },
    progress = TRUE
  )

  roi_lc_df <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(roi_lc_extract), function(i) {
    if (is.null(roi_lc_extract[[i]])) return(NULL)
    data.frame(
      grid_id = roi_effort$grid_id[i],
      class   = as.integer(names(roi_lc_extract[[i]])),
      prop    = as.numeric(roi_lc_extract[[i]])
    )
  }))

  roi_lc_df <- roi_lc_df %>%
    inner_join(
      st_drop_geometry(grid_summary_year) %>%
        select(grid_id, year, unique_users, cnc_users),
      by = "grid_id"
    ) %>%
    mutate(year = coalesce(year, year_to_process))

  roi_lc_df <- roi_lc_df %>%
    group_by(grid_id) %>%
    mutate(prop = prop / sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    ungroup()

  roi_lc_df_sum <- roi_lc_df %>%
    group_by(grid_id, class, year) %>%
    summarise(
      prop = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
      unique_users = first(unique_users),
      cnc_users = first(cnc_users),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  roi_lc_all_years[[as.character(year_to_process)]] <- roi_lc_df_sum

  write.csv(roi_lc_df_sum, paste0("roi_lc_df_sum_", year_to_process, ".csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

# Process INACTIVE grids

message("Processing inactive grids...")

inactive_sf <- st_read("grid_inactive.shp", quiet = TRUE) %>%
  st_transform(crs = crs(roi_landcover))

# Ensure numeric grid_id exists
if (!"grid_id" %in% names(inactive_sf)) {
  inactive_sf <- inactive_sf %>% mutate(grid_id = max(grid_sf$grid_id, na.rm = TRUE) + row_number())
}

# Extract landcover proportions for inactive grids
inactive_extract <- exactextractr::exact_extract(
  roi_landcover, inactive_sf,
  function(values, coverage_fraction) {
    tapply(coverage_fraction, values, sum, na.rm = TRUE)
  },
  progress = TRUE
)

inactive_lc <- bind_rows(lapply(seq_along(inactive_extract), function(i) {
  if (is.null(inactive_extract[[i]])) return(NULL)
  data.frame(
    grid_id = inactive_sf$grid_id[i],
    class   = as.integer(names(inactive_extract[[i]])),
    prop    = as.numeric(inactive_extract[[i]])
  )
}))

# Normalise proportions per grid
inactive_lc <- inactive_lc %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  mutate(prop = prop / sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    year = NA_integer_,
    unique_users = 0,
    cnc_users = 0
  )

# Add to list as “Inactive”
roi_lc_all_years[["Inactive"]] <- inactive_lc

# Combine all years + inactive grids into one dataset
roi_lc_all <- bind_rows(roi_lc_all_years, .id = "source")

# Save combined dataset
write.csv(roi_lc_all, "roi_lc_df_sum_all_years_including_inactive.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Quick sanity check
table(roi_lc_all$source)
# Should show 2023, 2024, 2025, Inactive
```

```{r}
# LAND COVER COMPOSITION — BASELINE vs CNC
# Across All Years (Weighted vs Unweighted)

# Subset grids
baseline_grid <- roi_lc_all %>% filter(unique_users >= 1)
cnc_grid      <- roi_lc_all %>% filter(cnc_users >= 1)

# Collapse across years 
# Aggregate to grid × class (sum over years)
baseline_collapsed <- baseline_grid %>%
  group_by(grid_id, class) %>%
  summarise(
    prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE),             # average land cover proportion
    weight = sum(unique_users, na.rm = TRUE),    # total user effort across years
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cnc_collapsed <- cnc_grid %>%
  group_by(grid_id, class) %>%
  summarise(
    prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    weight = sum(cnc_users, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Unweighted mean per class
baseline_unweighted <- baseline_collapsed %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(dataset = "Baseline", type = "Unweighted")

cnc_unweighted <- cnc_collapsed %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(dataset = "CNC", type = "Unweighted")

# Weighted mean per class (by total user effort)
baseline_weighted <- baseline_collapsed %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = weighted.mean(prop, w = weight, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(dataset = "Baseline", type = "Weighted")

cnc_weighted <- cnc_collapsed %>%
  group_by(class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = weighted.mean(prop, w = weight, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(dataset = "CNC", type = "Weighted")

# Combine all summaries
plot_df <- bind_rows(
  baseline_unweighted,
  cnc_unweighted,
  baseline_weighted,
  cnc_weighted
)

# Land cover class lookup
lc_labels <- c(
  "1"  = "allotment",
  "2"  = "house",
  "3"  = "cropland",
  "4"  = "foreshore",
  "5"  = "garden",
  "6"  = "grass",
  "7"  = "impervious",
  "8"  = "reeds",
  "9"  = "riparian",
  "10" = "road",
  "11" = "rough grass",
  "12" = "saltmarsh",
  "13" = "tidal water",
  "14" = "trees",
  "15" = "water"
)

plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(class_name = dplyr::recode(as.character(class), !!!lc_labels))

# Normalise within each dataset + type
plot_df_norm <- plot_df %>%
  group_by(dataset, type) %>%
  mutate(mean_prop_norm = mean_prop / sum(mean_prop, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot Weighted vs Unweighted 
ggplot(plot_df_norm, aes(x = class_name, y = mean_prop_norm, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~type) +
  labs(
    title = "Land cover composition of grids used in CNC vs Baseline (All Years)",
    subtitle = "Unweighted = unique grids; Weighted = grids weighted by total user activity across years",
    x = "Land cover class",
    y = "Proportion within dataset (sum = 1)",
    fill = "Dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# Mean proportion per grid (unweighted)
lc_mean_per_grid <- roi_lc_all %>%
  group_by(dataset = if_else(cnc_users >= 1, "CNC", "Baseline"),
           grid_id, class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

mean_per_grid_summary <- lc_mean_per_grid %>%
  group_by(dataset, class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(mean_prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(type = "Mean per Grid")

#  Weighted mean by user effort (across years)
lc_weighted_summary <- roi_lc_all %>%
  group_by(dataset = if_else(cnc_users >= 1, "CNC", "Baseline"),
           class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = weighted.mean(prop, w = cnc_users + unique_users, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(type = "Weighted by Effort")

ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = as.factor(class), y = mean_prop, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~type) +
  labs(
    title = "Land cover composition of CNC vs Baseline grids",
    subtitle = "Mean per grid vs Effort-weighted summaries",
    x = "Land cover class",
    y = "Mean proportion",
    fill = "Dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


# Combine for comparison
plot_df <- bind_rows(mean_per_grid_summary, lc_weighted_summary)

```

```{r land cover diversity across active grids and time}
# LAND COVER DIVERSITY (SHANNON INDEX)
# Across Multiple Years (Baseline vs CNC)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)

# Shannon Diversity (15-class) for Active vs Inactive
# ============================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(vegan)

# Subset grid squares per dataset
baseline_grid <- roi_lc_all %>%
  filter(unique_users >= 1)

cnc_grid <- roi_lc_all %>%
  filter(cnc_users >= 1)

inactive_grid <- inactive_lc  # assuming same structure (grid_id, class, prop, year, etc.)

# Pivot wider (grid_id × year = row; classes = columns)
baseline_grid_wide <- baseline_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(grid_id, year),
    names_from  = class,
    values_from = prop,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_sort  = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(total_prop = round(rowSums(across(-c(grid_id, year)), na.rm = TRUE), 2))

cnc_grid_wide <- cnc_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(grid_id, year),
    names_from  = class,
    values_from = prop,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_sort  = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(total_prop = round(rowSums(across(-c(grid_id, year)), na.rm = TRUE), 2))

inactive_grid_wide <- inactive_grid %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols     = c(grid_id, year),
    names_from  = class,
    values_from = prop,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_sort  = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(total_prop = round(rowSums(across(-c(grid_id, year)), na.rm = TRUE), 2))

#  Compute Shannon diversity per grid–year 
baseline_grid_wide$shannon_index <- vegan::diversity(
  baseline_grid_wide %>% select(-grid_id, -year, -total_prop) %>% replace(is.na(.), 0),
  index = "shannon"
)

cnc_grid_wide$shannon_index <- vegan::diversity(
  cnc_grid_wide %>% select(-grid_id, -year, -total_prop) %>% replace(is.na(.), 0),
  index = "shannon"
)

inactive_grid_wide$shannon_index <- vegan::diversity(
  inactive_grid_wide %>% select(-grid_id, -year, -total_prop) %>% replace(is.na(.), 0),
  index = "shannon"
)

# Combine all datasets into one tidy dataframe
plot_shannon <- bind_rows(
  baseline_grid_wide %>%
    select(grid_id, year, shannon_index) %>%
    mutate(dataset = "Baseline"),
  cnc_grid_wide %>%
    select(grid_id, year, shannon_index) %>%
    mutate(dataset = "CNC"),
  inactive_grid_wide %>%
    select(grid_id, year, shannon_index) %>%
    mutate(dataset = "Inactive")
)

# Boxplot (no t-test, just visual) 
ggplot(plot_shannon, aes(x = dataset, y = shannon_index, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.8, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.4, color = "black", size = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Shannon Diversity Index (Land Cover per Grid-Year)",
    subtitle = "Comparing Baseline, CNC, and Inactive grids",
    x = "Dataset",
    y = "Shannon Diversity Index"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

#  Density plot for visual comparison
ggplot(plot_shannon, aes(x = shannon_index, fill = dataset)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Shannon Diversity (Land Cover) per Grid-Year",
    subtitle = "Baseline vs CNC vs Inactive grids",
    x = "Shannon Diversity Index",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

# Save wide-format table for manual checking ----
plot_shannon_wide <- plot_shannon %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = dataset, values_from = shannon_index)

# View or write to CSV if needed
head(plot_shannon_wide)
# write_csv(plot_shannon_wide, "shannon_wide_check.csv")
```

```{r active grid comparison}
# Collapse across all weeks/years
grid_overlap <- grid_summary %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(
    any_baseline = any(unique_users > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    any_cnc = any(cnc_users > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    both_active = any_baseline & any_cnc
  )

# remove aspect of time and just focus on grids
grid_overlap %>%
  summarise(
    total_grids = n(),
    both = sum(both_active),
    baseline_only = sum(any_baseline & !any_cnc),
    cnc_only = sum(any_cnc & !any_baseline)
  )
```

```{r active grid comparison}
# Collapse activity over all years/weeks to classify grids
grid_overlap <- grid_summary %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(
    any_baseline = any(unique_users > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    any_cnc      = any(cnc_users > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    both_active  = any_baseline & any_cnc,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    activity_type = case_when(
      both_active ~ "Both-active",
      any_baseline & !any_cnc ~ "Baseline-only",
      any_cnc & !any_baseline ~ "CNC-only",
      TRUE ~ "Inactive"
    )
  )

# Collapse ROI land cover across all years
roi_lc_all_collapsed <- roi_lc_all %>%
  group_by(grid_id, class) %>%
  summarise(prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Check that land-cover proportions sum to ~1 per grid
prop_check <- roi_lc_all_collapsed %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(total_prop = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE))

summary(prop_check$total_prop)
hist(prop_check$total_prop, main = "Distribution of total land-cover proportion per grid",
     xlab = "Total proportion", col = "skyblue", border = "white")

# flag potentially problematic grids (high deviation)
bad_grids <- prop_check %>%
  filter(total_prop < 0.95 | total_prop > 1.05)

cat("Grids with total land-cover proportion outside 0.95–1.05 range:", nrow(bad_grids), "\n")

# Join activity type back to ROI land-cover data
roi_lc_all_joined <- roi_lc_all_collapsed %>%
  left_join(select(grid_overlap, grid_id, activity_type), by = "grid_id")

# Add inactive land-cover grids
inactive_lc <- inactive_lc %>%
  mutate(activity_type = "Inactive")

roi_lc_all_joined <- bind_rows(roi_lc_all_joined, inactive_lc)

# Land-cover class labels 
lc_labels <- c(
  "1"  = "allotment",
  "2"  = "urban",
  "3"  = "cropland",
  "4"  = "foreshore",
  "5"  = "garden",
  "6"  = "grass",
  "7"  = "impervious",
  "8"  = "reeds",
  "9"  = "riparian",
  "10" = "road",
  "11" = "rough grass",
  "12" = "saltmarsh",
  "13" = "tidal water",
  "14" = "trees",
  "15" = "water"
)

# Summarise and plot
lc_summary_activity <- roi_lc_all_joined %>%
  group_by(activity_type, class) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(class_name = dplyr::recode(as.character(class), !!!lc_labels))

ggplot(lc_summary_activity, aes(x = class_name, y = mean_prop, fill = activity_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Land-Cover Proportion per Grid",
    subtitle = "Comparison across CNC-only, Baseline-only, and Both-active grids",
    x = "Land-cover class",
    y = "Mean proportion per grid square",
    fill = "Activity Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r active grid comparison}
#  Land-cover composition & heterogeneity by activity type
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)

# Blue / Green / Grey composition & Shannon diversity


# Prepare full grid_overlap table (with Inactive
all_grids <- unique(roi_lc_all_joined$grid_id)

# Patch grid_overlap so every grid_id has an activity_type
grid_overlap_complete <- grid_overlap %>%
  mutate(activity_type = ifelse(is.na(activity_type), "Inactive", activity_type))

# Add any grids not in grid_overlap as 'Inactive'
missing_inactive <- setdiff(all_grids, grid_overlap_complete$grid_id)

grid_overlap_complete <- bind_rows(
  grid_overlap_complete,
  tibble(grid_id = missing_inactive, activity_type = "Inactive")
)

# Join activity_type cleanly
roi_lc_all_joined <- roi_lc_all_joined %>%
  select(-matches("activity_type")) %>%
  left_join(
    grid_overlap_complete %>% select(grid_id, activity_type),
    by = "grid_id"
  )

#  Add inactive_lc (if it exists as separate object)
if (exists("inactive_lc")) {
  inactive_lc <- inactive_lc %>% mutate(activity_type = "Inactive")
  roi_lc_all_joined <- bind_rows(roi_lc_all_joined, inactive_lc)
}

# Classify land-cover into Blue / Green / Grey
roi_lc_bg <- roi_lc_all_joined %>%
  mutate(
    cover_group = case_when(
      class %in% c(15, 13, 12, 9, 8, 4) ~ "Blue",   # tidal, water, foreshore, etc.
      class %in% c(1, 3, 5, 6, 14, 11) ~ "Green",   # allotment, trees, grass, etc.
      class %in% c(2, 7, 10) ~ "Grey",              # urban, impervious, road
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cover_group)) %>%
  group_by(grid_id, activity_type, cover_group) %>%
  summarise(prop = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  tidyr::complete(cover_group, fill = list(prop = 0)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  mutate(prop = prop / sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Sanity checks
## Proportions should sum ≈ 1 per grid
check_norm <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(total_prop = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  summarise(min = min(total_prop), mean = mean(total_prop), max = max(total_prop))
print(check_norm)

## Should have exactly 3 cover groups per grid
roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(n_cover_types = n_distinct(cover_group)) %>%
  count(n_cover_types)

## Check grids per activity type
roi_lc_bg %>%
  distinct(grid_id, activity_type) %>%
  count(activity_type, name = "unique_grids")

# Compute Shannon diversity per grid
# First, aggregate to one row per (grid_id, activity_type, class)
roi_lc_for_div <- roi_lc_all_joined %>%
  group_by(grid_id, activity_type, class) %>%
  summarise(prop = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Normalise proportions within each grid
roi_lc_div <- roi_lc_for_div %>%
  group_by(grid_id, activity_type) %>%
  mutate(prop = prop / sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  summarise(
    shannon = vegan::diversity(prop, index = "shannon"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Summarise mean proportion per activity type & cover group
roi_lc_bg_summary <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(activity_type, cover_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_prop   = sd(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_grids   = n_distinct(grid_id),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )

# Plot mean Blue/Green/Grey proportions
ggplot(roi_lc_bg_summary, aes(x = cover_group, y = mean_prop, fill = activity_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", width = 0.7, color = "grey20") +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Proportion of Blue, Green, and Grey Space by Grid Activity Type",
    subtitle = "Including CNC-only, Baseline-only, Both-active, and Inactive grids",
    x = "Cover Type",
    y = "Mean Proportion per Grid",
    fill = "Activity Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"))

# Diagnostic: each grid belongs to exactly one activity type
roi_lc_bg %>%
  count(grid_id, activity_type) %>%
  count(grid_id) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n))) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#3182bd") +
  labs(
    title = "Grid duplication check",
    subtitle = "Each grid should appear in exactly one activity_type group",
    x = "Number of activity types per grid",
    y = "Count of grids"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r stacked bar}
# Summarise proportions per activity type & cover group
lc_composition <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(activity_type, cover_group) %>%
  summarise(mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(activity_type) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(mean_prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    rel_prop = mean_prop / total   # normalise within activity type
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot stacked bar (each bar sums to 1 per activity type)
ggplot(lc_composition, aes(
  x = forcats::fct_relevel(activity_type, "CNC-only", "Baseline-only", "Both-active", "Inactive"),
  y = rel_prop, fill = cover_group
)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Blue" = "#56B4E9", "Green" = "#009E73", "Grey" = "#999999"),
    name = "Cover type"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "Land-cover composition by activity type",
    subtitle = "Proportion of Blue, Green, and Grey space per grid category",
    x = "Activity type",
    y = "Relative land-cover proportion"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

# checks!
## Check each grid sums ≈ 1
check_norm <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(total_prop = sum(prop, na.rm = TRUE))
summary(check_norm$total_prop)

# Each grid should have exactly 3 cover groups
roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(n_cover_types = n_distinct(cover_group)) %>%
  count(n_cover_types)

## Within each activity type, check how often Blue/Green/Grey appear
roi_lc_bg %>%
  group_by(activity_type, cover_group) %>%
  summarise(
    prop_nonzero = mean(prop > 0),
    mean_nonzero = mean(prop[prop > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_all = mean(prop),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

## Number of unique grids per activity type
roi_lc_bg %>%
  distinct(grid_id, activity_type) %>%
  count(activity_type, name = "unique_grids")
```

```{r bootstrapped comparisons}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)

set.seed(123)

# Function for bootstrapping differences
boot_diff <- function(data, group_col, value_col, g1, g2, n_boot = 1000) {
  x1 <- data %>% filter(!!sym(group_col) == g1) %>% pull(!!sym(value_col))
  x2 <- data %>% filter(!!sym(group_col) == g2) %>% pull(!!sym(value_col))
  
  n <- min(length(x1), length(x2))
  diffs <- replicate(n_boot, {
    mean(sample(x2, n, replace = TRUE)) - mean(sample(x1, n, replace = TRUE))
  })
  
  tibble(
    comparison  = paste(g2, "-", g1),
    median_diff = median(diffs),
    lower_CI    = quantile(diffs, 0.025),
    upper_CI    = quantile(diffs, 0.975),
    p_value     = mean(diffs < 0)
  )
}

# BLUE SPACE
blue_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Both-active", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Blue")

# GREEN SPACE 
green_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Both-active", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Green")

# GREY SPACE 
grey_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Both-active", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Grey")

# SHANNON DIVERSITY
shannon_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Both-active", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Shannon")

# Combine all results
boot_results <- bind_rows(blue_boot, green_boot, grey_boot, shannon_boot)

# View results
boot_results %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 4)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

# Plot 
ggplot(boot_results, aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
                width = 0.2,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrapped mean differences between activity types",
    subtitle = "Positive = higher value in second group",
    y = "Mean difference (95% CI)",
    x = "Comparison"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)
```

```{r}
boot_results %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_CI_width = mean(upper_CI - lower_CI),
    median_diff_mean = mean(median_diff)
  )

boot_results %>%
  mutate(CI_width = upper_CI - lower_CI,
         rel_CI = CI_width / abs(median_diff)) %>%
  group_by(metric) %>%
  summarise(mean_rel_CI = mean(rel_CI, na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
boot_results <- boot_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(lower_CI > 0 | upper_CI < 0, TRUE, FALSE))

ggplot(boot_results, aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff, fill = metric, alpha = sig)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.6, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
                width = 0.2,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.4), guide = "none") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Blue"    = "#56B4E9",
      "Green"   = "#009E73",
      "Grey"    = "#999999",
      "Shannon" = "#E69F00"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrapped differences in land-cover and heterogeneity metrics",
    subtitle = "Bars shaded lighter if 95% CI overlaps zero (not significant)",
    y = "Median difference (95% CI)",
    x = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r plot option}
# Flag significance (CI does not cross zero)
boot_results <- boot_results %>%
  mutate(sig = if_else(lower_CI > 0 | upper_CI < 0, "Significant", "Not significant"))

# Intuitive colour palette
metric_cols <- c(
  "Blue"    = "#1f78b4",
  "Green"   = "#33a02c",
  "Grey"    = "#7a7a7a",
  "Shannon" = "#9b59b6"
)

ggplot(boot_results,
       aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff,
           color = metric)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
                width = 0.15,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = if_else(sig == "Significant", metric, NA_character_)),
             shape = 21,
             size = 4,
             stroke = 1.2,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
             color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = metric_cols, na.value = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = metric_cols) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrapped mean differences between activity types",
    subtitle = "Filled points = significant (95% CI excludes 0); empty circles = not significant",
    y = "Mean difference (95% CI)",
    x = "Comparison"
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)  # 🔹 rotation here
  )
```

```{r}
boot_results %>%
  mutate(
    sig = !(lower_CI < 0 & upper_CI > 0),
    metric = factor(metric, levels = c("Blue", "Green", "Grey", "Shannon")),
    comparison = factor(comparison, levels = rev(unique(comparison))),
    
    # Normalised fill scale for each metric
    fill_color = case_when(
      metric == "Blue"    ~ rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1)),
      metric == "Green"   ~ rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1)),
      metric == "Grey"    ~ rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1)),
      metric == "Shannon" ~ rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1))
    ),
    
    # Metric-specific color palettes
    color_hex = case_when(
  metric == "Blue"    ~ scales::gradient_n_pal(c("#deebf7", "#3182bd"))(rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1))),
  metric == "Green"   ~ scales::gradient_n_pal(c("#e5f5e0", "#31a354"))(rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1))),
  metric == "Grey"    ~ scales::gradient_n_pal(c("#f7f7f7", "#bdbdbd", "#252525"))(rescale(median_diff, from =       range(boot_results$median_diff, na.rm = TRUE))),
  metric == "Shannon" ~ scales::gradient_n_pal(c("#fee6ce", "#e6550d"))(rescale(median_diff, to = c(0, 1)))
)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = metric, y = comparison, fill = color_hex, alpha = sig)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.2f\n[%.2f, %.2f]", median_diff, lower_CI, upper_CI)),
    size = 3, color = "black", fontface = "bold", lineheight = 0.9
  ) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 1, "FALSE" = 0.4), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrapped differences in land-cover and heterogeneity metrics",
    subtitle = "Blue = Blue space, Green = Vegetation, Grey = Urban, Orange = Shannon diversity",
    x = "Metric", y = "Comparison"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r inactive vs active grids}
roi_lc_bg_active_test <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  mutate(activity_group = ifelse(activity_type == "Inactive", "Inactive", "Active"))

roi_lc_div_active_test <- roi_lc_div %>%
  mutate(activity_group = ifelse(activity_type == "Inactive", "Inactive", "Active"))

set.seed(123)

# BLUE SPACE
blue_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_bg_active_test %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"),
  "activity_group", "prop",
  "Active", "Inactive"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Blue")

# GREEN SPACE
green_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_bg_active_test %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"),
  "activity_group", "prop",
  "Active", "Inactive"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Green")

# GREY SPACE 
grey_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_bg_active_test %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"),
  "activity_group", "prop",
  "Active", "Inactive"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Grey")

# SHANNON DIVERSITY
shannon_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_div_active_test,
  "activity_group", "shannon",
  "Active", "Inactive"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Shannon")

# Combine all results
boot_results_AI <- bind_rows(blue_boot_AI, green_boot_AI, grey_boot_AI, shannon_boot_AI)

#
boot_results_AI %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 4)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

ggplot(boot_results_AI, aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "grey30") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI), width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrapped mean differences: Active vs Inactive grids",
    subtitle = "Positive = higher value in Inactive grids",
    y = "Mean difference (95% CI)",
    x = "Comparison"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r final boot strap}
# BLUE SPACE
blue_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Both-active", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"), "activity_type", "prop", "Inactive", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Blue")

# GREEN SPACE
green_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Both-active", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"), "activity_type", "prop", "Inactive", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Green")

# GREY SPACE
grey_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Both-active", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"), "activity_type", "prop", "Inactive", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Grey")

# SHANNON DIVERSITY
shannon_boot <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Baseline-only", "Both-active"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Baseline-only", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Both-active", "CNC-only"),
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div, "activity_type", "shannon", "Inactive", "CNC-only")
) %>%
  mutate(metric = "Shannon")

##
boot_results <- bind_rows(blue_boot, green_boot, grey_boot, shannon_boot) %>%
  mutate(
    comparison = factor(
      comparison,
      levels = c("CNC-only - Inactive",
                 "CNC-only - Baseline-only",
                 "CNC-only - Both-active",
                 "Both-active - Baseline-only")
    )
  )

## Final plot: vertical stacked panels with shared x-axis

# Flag significance (CI does not cross zero)
boot_results <- boot_results %>%
  mutate(sig = if_else(lower_CI > 0 | upper_CI < 0, "Significant", "Not significant"))

# colour palette
metric_cols <- c(
  "Blue"    = "#1f78b4",
  "Green"   = "#33a02c",
  "Grey"    = "#7a7a7a",
  "Shannon" = "#9b59b6"
)

# Function for consistent metric panels
plot_metric <- function(metric_name, show_x_labels = FALSE) {
  ggplot(boot_results %>% filter(metric == metric_name),
         aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff, color = metric)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
                  width = 0.15) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = if_else(sig == "Significant", metric, NA_character_)),
               shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 1.2, color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = metric_cols, na.value = "white") +
    scale_color_manual(values = metric_cols) +
    labs(y = metric_name,
         x = if (show_x_labels) "Comparison" else NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45, hjust = 1,
        size = if (show_x_labels) 11 else 0,
        color = if (show_x_labels) "black" else "transparent"
      ),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = if (show_x_labels) 12 else 0),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

# Combine vertically with shared x-axis (bottom only labeled)
p_blue    <- plot_metric("Blue",    show_x_labels = FALSE)
p_green   <- plot_metric("Green",   show_x_labels = FALSE)
p_grey    <- plot_metric("Grey",    show_x_labels = FALSE)
p_shannon <- plot_metric("Shannon", show_x_labels = TRUE)

combined_plot <- (p_blue / p_green / p_grey / p_shannon) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Bootstrapped mean differences between CNC and other grid types",
    subtitle = "Filled points = significant (95% CI excludes 0); empty = not significant",
    caption = "Comparisons: CNC-only vs Inactive, Baseline-only, Both-active, and Baseline vs Both-active"
  )

print(combined_plot)
```

```{r}
️# Bootstrapped mean differences: Active vs Inactive

set.seed(123)

# Re-run bootstraps (flipped direction)
blue_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_bg_active_test %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"),
  "activity_group", "prop",
  "Inactive", "Active"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Blue")

green_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_bg_active_test %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"),
  "activity_group", "prop",
  "Inactive", "Active"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Green")

grey_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_bg_active_test %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"),
  "activity_group", "prop",
  "Inactive", "Active"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Grey")

shannon_boot_AI <- boot_diff(
  roi_lc_div_active_test,
  "activity_group", "shannon",
  "Inactive", "Active"
) %>% mutate(metric = "Shannon")

# Combine and flag significance
boot_results_AI <- bind_rows(blue_boot_AI, green_boot_AI, grey_boot_AI, shannon_boot_AI) %>%
  mutate(sig = if_else(lower_CI > 0 | upper_CI < 0, "Significant", "Not significant"))

# Colour palette (consistent)
metric_cols <- c(
  "Blue"    = "#1f78b4",
  "Green"   = "#33a02c",
  "Grey"    = "#7a7a7a",
  "Shannon" = "#9b59b6"
)

# Plot results
ggplot(boot_results_AI,
       aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff, color = metric)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
                width = 0.15,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.6)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = if_else(sig == "Significant", metric, NA_character_)),
             shape = 21,
             size = 4,
             stroke = 1.2,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.6),
             color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = metric_cols, na.value = "white") +
  scale_color_manual(values = metric_cols) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Bootstrapped mean differences: Active vs Inactive grids",
    subtitle = "Filled points = significant (95% CI excludes 0); positive = higher in Active grids",
    y = "Mean difference (95% CI)",
    x = "Comparison"
  ) +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r three way comparison FINAL VERSION}
# ️FINAL ANALYSIS:
#   Simplified comparison of land-cover by:
#     - Active (Baseline-only + Both-active)
#     - CNC-only
#     - Inactive
#   Bootstrapped differences

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)

# Recode activity groups
#
roi_lc_bg2 <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  mutate(
    activity_simple = case_when(
      activity_type %in% c("Baseline-only", "Both-active") ~ "Active",
      activity_type == "CNC-only"                          ~ "CNC-only",
      activity_type == "Inactive"                          ~ "Inactive"
    )
  )

roi_lc_div2 <- roi_lc_div %>%
  mutate(
    activity_simple = case_when(
      activity_type %in% c("Baseline-only", "Both-active") ~ "Active",
      activity_type == "CNC-only"                          ~ "CNC-only",
      activity_type == "Inactive"                          ~ "Inactive"
    )
  )


# Run bootstraps: CNC-only vs Active, CNC-only vs Inactive,
#                    and Active vs Inactive

set.seed(123)

# BLUE 
blue_new <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Active",  "CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Inactive","CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Blue"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Inactive","Active")
) %>% mutate(metric = "Blue")

# GREEN 
green_new <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Active",  "CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Inactive","CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Green"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Inactive","Active")
) %>% mutate(metric = "Green")

# GREY 
grey_new <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Active",  "CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Inactive","CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_bg2 %>% filter(cover_group == "Grey"),
            "activity_simple", "prop", "Inactive","Active")
) %>% mutate(metric = "Grey")

# SHANNON 
shannon_new <- bind_rows(
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div2,
            "activity_simple", "shannon", "Active",  "CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div2,
            "activity_simple", "shannon", "Inactive","CNC-only"),
  
  boot_diff(roi_lc_div2,
            "activity_simple", "shannon", "Inactive","Active")
) %>% mutate(metric = "Shannon")

# Combine all metrics & flag significance

boot_new <- bind_rows(blue_new, green_new, grey_new, shannon_new) %>%
  mutate(sig = if_else(lower_CI > 0 | upper_CI < 0, "Significant", "Not significant"))

# Clean factor order for readability
boot_new$comparison <- factor(
  boot_new$comparison,
  levels = c(
    "CNC-only - Active",
    "CNC-only - Inactive",
    "Active - Inactive"
  )
)

# Colours
metric_cols <- c(
  "Blue"    = "#1f78b4",
  "Green"   = "#33a02c",
  "Grey"    = "#7a7a7a",
  "Shannon" = "#9b59b6"
)

# Plot: stacked panels with shared x-axis
#

plot_metric_new <- function(metric_name, show_x_labels = FALSE) {
  ggplot(boot_new %>% filter(metric == metric_name),
         aes(x = comparison, y = median_diff, color = metric)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
                  width = 0.15) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = if_else(sig == "Significant", metric, NA_character_)),
               shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 1.2, color = "black") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = metric_cols, na.value = "white") +
    scale_color_manual(values = metric_cols) +
    labs(y = metric_name,
         x = if (show_x_labels) "Comparison" else NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(
        angle = 45, hjust = 1,
        size = if (show_x_labels) 11 else 0,
        color = if (show_x_labels) "black" else "transparent"
      ),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = if (show_x_labels) 12 else 0),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

p_blue_new    <- plot_metric_new("Blue",    show_x_labels = FALSE)
p_green_new   <- plot_metric_new("Green",   show_x_labels = FALSE)
p_grey_new    <- plot_metric_new("Grey",    show_x_labels = FALSE)
p_shannon_new <- plot_metric_new("Shannon", show_x_labels = TRUE)

combined_new <- (p_blue_new / p_green_new / p_grey_new / p_shannon_new) +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(
    title = "Simplified Land-Cover Differences: CNC-only vs Active vs Inactive",
    subtitle = "Bootstrapped mean differences (95% CI). Filled points = significant.",
    caption = "Active = Baseline-only + Both-active"
  )

print(combined_new)

ggsave(
  filename = "bootplot.png",
  plot = combined_new,        # your ggplot object
  width = 6,             # width
  height = 8,            # height
  units = "in",          # "in", "cm", or "mm"
  dpi = 600              # resolution
)

# summary
roi_lc_bg_summary_f <- roi_lc_bg %>%
  mutate(
    activity_simple = case_when(
      activity_type %in% c("Baseline-only", "Both-active") ~ "Active",
      activity_type == "CNC-only"                          ~ "CNC-only",
      activity_type == "Inactive"                          ~ "Inactive",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(activity_simple, cover_group) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_prop   = sd(prop, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups   = "drop"
  )
```

```{r grid export}
#  Export Baseline-only, CNC-only, and Both-active grids

# Join the activity classification back to the grid geometry
grid_sf_activity <- grid_sf %>%
  left_join(grid_overlap, by = "grid_id")

# Split into subsets
grid_baseline <- grid_sf_activity %>% filter(activity_type == "Baseline-only")
grid_cnc      <- grid_sf_activity %>% filter(activity_type == "CNC-only")
grid_both     <- grid_sf_activity %>% filter(activity_type == "Both-active")

# Optional: print counts
cat("Baseline-only:", nrow(grid_baseline), "\n")
cat("CNC-only:", nrow(grid_cnc), "\n")
cat("Both-active:", nrow(grid_both), "\n")

# Write to shapefiles
st_write(grid_baseline, "grid_baseline_only.shp", delete_layer = TRUE)
st_write(grid_cnc,      "grid_cnc_only.shp",      delete_layer = TRUE)
st_write(grid_both,     "grid_both_active.shp",   delete_layer = TRUE)
```

```{r diversity models}
#  Create spatial version of CNC observations
cnc_obs_sf <- cnc_observations %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326) %>%       # WGS84
  st_transform(st_crs(grid_sf))                                       # match grid CRS

#  Spatial join: assign each observation to its grid cell
cnc_obs_grid <- st_join(cnc_obs_sf, grid_sf["grid_id"], join = st_within)

# Summarise diversity, users, and effort per grid
cnc_grid_summary <- cnc_obs_grid %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  group_by(grid_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_obs    = n(),                       # total observations
    richness = n_distinct(taxon_id),      # unique taxa
    n_users  = n_distinct(user_id),       # unique observers
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

#  Join land-cover and Shannon diversity
cnc_model_df <- cnc_grid_summary %>%
  left_join(
    roi_lc_bg %>%
      dplyr::select(grid_id, cover_group, prop) %>%
      tidyr::pivot_wider(
        names_from = cover_group,
        values_from = prop,
        names_prefix = "prop_"
      ),
    by = "grid_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    roi_lc_div %>% dplyr::select(grid_id, shannon),
    by = "grid_id"
  )

#
cnc_model_df <- cnc_model_df %>%
  mutate(
    prop_Blue  = tidyr::replace_na(prop_Blue, 0),
    prop_Green = tidyr::replace_na(prop_Green, 0),
    prop_Grey  = tidyr::replace_na(prop_Grey, 0)
  )
```


### CNC paper analysis stops here
```{r diversity models}
# check distribution
par(mfrow=c(2,3))
hist(cnc_model_df$richness)
hist(cnc_model_df$n_obs)
hist(cnc_model_df$n_users)
hist(cnc_model_df$prop_Green)
hist(cnc_model_df$prop_Blue)
hist(cnc_model_df$prop_Grey)

# check for variance inflation around variables
library(car)
vif(glm(richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Green + shannon + n_users + n_obs, data = cnc_model_df, family = poisson))

# Compute correlation matrix among predictors
predictors <- cnc_model_df[, c("prop_Blue", "prop_Green", "shannon", "n_users", "n_obs")]
cor_matrix <- cor(predictors, use = "complete.obs", method = "pearson")

# Print correlation matrix
print(cor_matrix)

# (Optional) Visualize correlation matrix
library(corrplot)
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper", tl.col = "black", tl.srt = 45)
# correlation matrix

# Fit nt great
glm_rich <- glm(
  richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + log(n_obs),
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson(link = "log")
)
summary(glm_rich)
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
plot(glm_rich)

# fit gam to deal with non-linear effect of observations
gam_rich <- gam(
  richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + s(n_obs),
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson
)
summary(gam_rich)
plot(gam_rich)
gam.check(gam_rich)

# better with log
gam_rich_log <- gam(
  richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + s(log(n_obs)),
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson)

summary(gam_rich_log)
plot(gam_rich_log)
gam.check(gam_rich_log)

#
deviance(gam_rich_log) / df.residual(gam_rich_log)

# users not better are some only recorded a few
gam_rich_users <- gam(
  richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + s(n_users),
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson
)
summary(gam_rich_users)
plot(gam_rich_users)
gam.check(gam_rich_users)
AIC(glm_rich, gam_rich, gam_rich_log, gam_rich_users, gam_rich_log_green)

#
gam_rich_log <- gam(
  richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + s(log(n_obs)),
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson
)
summary(gam_rich_log)
plot(gam_rich_log)
gam.check(gam_rich_log)
plot(gam_rich_log, all.terms = TRUE, pages = 1, shade = TRUE)

# diag for final model
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
gam.check(gam_rich_log)

# alt with green (no diff. between grey or green)
gam_rich_log_green <- gam(
  richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Green + shannon + s(log(n_obs)),
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson
)
summary(gam_rich_log_green)
plot(gam_rich_log_green)
gam.check(gam_rich_log_green)
plot(gam_rich_log_green, all.terms = TRUE, pages = 1, shade = TRUE)
```

```{r observations}
glm_obs <- glm(
  n_obs ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + n_users,
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = poisson(link = "log")
)
summary(glm_obs)
par(mfrow=c(2,2))
plot(glm_obs)

#
glm_obs_q <- glm(
  n_obs ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + n_users,
  data = cnc_model_df,
  family = quasipoisson(link = "log")
)
summary(glm_obs_q)

#
library(MASS)
glm_obs_nb <- glm.nb(
  n_obs ~ prop_Blue + prop_Grey + shannon + n_users,
  data = cnc_model_df
)
summary(glm_obs_nb)

AIC(glm_obs, glm_obs_q, glm_obs_nb)
plot(glm_obs_nb) # grid 228, 163 and 360 outliers
```

```{r diversity models}
# Preferred (keeps all attributes + CRS)
# Example join: add richness, users, and activity type to grid_sf
grid_export <- grid_sf %>%
  left_join(cnc_model_df %>%
              select(grid_id, richness, n_users, n_obs, prop_Blue, prop_Green, prop_Grey, shannon),
            by = "grid_id") %>%
  left_join(grid_overlap %>%
              select(grid_id, activity_type),
            by = "grid_id")

st_write(grid_export, "grid_export.gpkg", layer = "grid", delete_dsn = TRUE)

# Optional shapefile version (if you need .shp)
st_write(grid_export, "grid_export.shp", delete_layer = TRUE)

```

```{r}
# Users models
glm_users_nat <- glm(n_users ~ prop_Blue + prop_Green + shannon,
                     family = poisson(link = "log"), data = cnc_model_df)
glm_users_grey <- glm(n_users ~ prop_Grey + shannon,
                      family = poisson(link = "log"), data = cnc_model_df)

# Richness models
glm_rich_nat <- glm(richness ~ prop_Blue + prop_Green + shannon + log(n_obs),
                    family = poisson(link = "log"), data = cnc_model_df)
glm_rich_grey <- glm(richness ~ prop_Grey + shannon + log(n_obs),
                     family = poisson(link = "log"), data = cnc_model_df)

# Compare fits
AIC(glm_users_nat, glm_users_grey, glm_rich_nat, glm_rich_grey)
```
